recipes.name: JWT Authentication
recipes.tagline: Stateless auth with access + refresh tokens and bcrypt password hashing
recipes.description: Add production-ready JWT authentication to any Express/Node.js API. Includes access tokens (15-min expiry), refresh tokens (7-day expiry), bcrypt password hashing, auth middleware, and a full test sui
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: NextAuth.js Setup
recipes.tagline: Drop-in auth for Next.js: Google, GitHub, email/password, session management
recipes.description: Add NextAuth.js to a Next.js app with Google OAuth, GitHub OAuth, credentials provider, and Prisma adapter for session persistence. Production-ready in one session.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: API Key Authentication
recipes.tagline: Secure machine-to-machine auth with hashed keys, scopes, and rate limiting
recipes.description: Add API key authentication for machine-to-machine communication. Keys are hashed (never stored in plain text), support scopes (read/write/admin), and tie into rate limiting.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Prisma + PostgreSQL
recipes.tagline: Type-safe ORM with schema-first migrations, seed data, and connection pooling
recipes.description: Set up Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL from zero: schema definition, initial migration, seed script, and connection pooling with PgBouncer-compatible connection strings.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Mongoose + MongoDB
recipes.tagline: Document database with schema validation, indexes, and connection management
recipes.description: Set up Mongoose with MongoDB Atlas or local Docker. Includes schema validation, compound indexes, connection retry logic, and TypeScript interfaces auto-generated from schemas.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Redis Caching Layer
recipes.tagline: Response caching with Redis — automatic invalidation, TTL, and cache-aside pattern
recipes.description: Add Redis caching to any Express API using the cache-aside pattern. Includes a cacheMiddleware for automatic route-level caching, manual cache invalidation helpers, and graceful degradation if Redis i
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Drizzle ORM + SQLite
recipes.tagline: Lightweight SQL with Drizzle — perfect for edge functions, Cloudflare Workers, Bun
recipes.description: Set up Drizzle ORM with SQLite (via better-sqlite3 or Bun native). Schema-first, fully type-safe, no migration runner required. Ideal for edge deployments and local-first apps.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Vitest Testing Framework
recipes.tagline: Blazing fast unit tests with TypeScript, coverage, and watch mode
recipes.description: Set up Vitest from scratch: TypeScript support, V8 coverage reports, path aliases, and a sample test. Runs 10x faster than Jest on cold starts.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Jest Testing Framework
recipes.tagline: Battle-tested unit testing with TypeScript, mocks, and Istanbul coverage
recipes.description: Set up Jest with TypeScript (via ts-jest), Istanbul coverage, module mocking, and a sensible default config. The standard for Node.js testing.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Playwright End-to-End Tests
recipes.tagline: Cross-browser E2E testing with Playwright: Chrome, Firefox, Safari
recipes.description: Add Playwright for end-to-end testing against a running server. Includes browser setup, page object model pattern, GitHub Actions CI integration, and screenshot on failure.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Pytest Setup
recipes.tagline: Python testing with pytest, fixtures, coverage, and async support
recipes.description: Set up pytest for a Python project: fixtures, conftest.py, async test support (pytest-asyncio), coverage reporting, and parametrize for data-driven tests.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: GitHub Actions CI
recipes.tagline: Lint + test + build on every push, Node 18/20/22 matrix, cache npm deps
recipes.description: Add a production-grade GitHub Actions CI pipeline: typecheck, lint, test (Node 18/20/22 matrix), build, and optional npm publish on release tags. npm dependency caching keeps it fast.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Docker + Docker Compose
recipes.tagline: Containerize any Node.js app with multi-stage builds and compose for local dev
recipes.description: Add Docker to a Node.js project: multi-stage Dockerfile (builder + production), docker-compose.yml for local development with PostgreSQL and Redis, and .dockerignore.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Vercel Deployment
recipes.tagline: Zero-config deploy to Vercel with preview URLs, environment variables, and edge config
recipes.description: Configure a Next.js or Node.js project for Vercel deployment. Includes vercel.json, environment variable setup in Vercel dashboard, preview URL configuration, and GitHub integration for automatic depl
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: ESLint + Prettier
recipes.tagline: Consistent code style enforced at commit time — no more style debates in PRs
recipes.description: Set up ESLint with TypeScript rules and Prettier for formatting. Configured to run as a pre-commit hook via lint-staged, so formatting errors never reach the repo.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Husky + lint-staged
recipes.tagline: Pre-commit hooks: only lint and format files you actually changed
recipes.description: Add Husky for git hooks and lint-staged to run ESLint and Prettier only on staged files. Commit-msg hook enforces Conventional Commits format.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: TypeScript Strict Mode
recipes.tagline: Enable strictest TypeScript settings and fix every resulting error
recipes.description: Upgrade a TypeScript project to strict mode: enable strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes, and fix every resulting type error. Leaves the codebase bulletproof.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: OpenAPI / Swagger Docs
recipes.tagline: Auto-generated, interactive API docs from your TypeScript types
recipes.description: Add OpenAPI 3.0 documentation to an Express API using tsoa or swagger-jsdoc. Generates /docs with Swagger UI and a machine-readable openapi.json at /api-docs.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: API Rate Limiting
recipes.tagline: Per-IP and per-user rate limiting with Redis-backed sliding window
recipes.description: Add rate limiting to an Express API: global limit (100 req/min per IP), authenticated user limit (1000 req/min), and endpoint-specific limits. Redis-backed for distributed deployments.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Request Validation with Zod
recipes.tagline: Type-safe request parsing — runtime validation from your TypeScript types
recipes.description: Add Zod schema validation to all API endpoints. Request bodies, query params, and route params are validated at the boundary — invalid requests get a 400 with detailed error messages before touching b
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Security Headers with Helmet
recipes.tagline: Add 15 security headers in one line — CSP, HSTS, XSS protection, and more
recipes.description: Add Helmet.js to an Express app with a production-ready Content Security Policy, HSTS, and referrer policy. Configured correctly so it doesn't break your frontend.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Environment Variable Validation
recipes.tagline: Crash at startup if required env vars are missing — not at 2am in production
recipes.description: Validate all environment variables at startup using Zod. If any required variable is missing or has the wrong type, the app refuses to start with a clear error message listing exactly what's wrong.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: CORS Configuration
recipes.tagline: Precise CORS setup that works in dev, staging, and production without wildcards
recipes.description: Configure CORS for an Express API: allowlist of origins per environment, preflight caching, credentials support, and logging for blocked origins to catch misconfigurations.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Structured Logging with Pino
recipes.tagline: JSON logs with request IDs, levels, and millisecond timestamps — ready for Datadog/CloudWatch
recipes.description: Replace console.log with Pino structured logging. Every log line is JSON with timestamp, level, requestId, and context. Log levels are configurable per environment. Integrates with any log aggregator.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Health Check Endpoint
recipes.tagline: /health returns DB status, uptime, version — works with Kubernetes liveness probes
recipes.description: Add /health and /ready endpoints to any Express API. Checks database connectivity, Redis connectivity, and returns service version and uptime. Compatible with Kubernetes liveness/readiness probes.
recipes.author: agentgram

recipes.name: Sentry Error Tracking
recipes.tagline: Catch every unhandled error in production with full stack traces and context
recipes.description: Integrate Sentry for error monitoring: unhandled exceptions, promise rejections, Express error middleware, user context, and custom breadcrumbs. Source maps uploaded on deploy so errors point to TypeS
recipes.author: agentgram
